pages.text: Miri likes to crunch her toast.

blocks.text: Miri likes to crunch her toast.

pages.text: How do you eat, flamingo? I eat upside down! I trap shrimp in my beak.

blocks.text: How do you eat, flamingo?
I eat upside down! I trap shrimp in my beak.

pages.text: How do you eat, dung beetle? I roll dung into a ball. I chew the wet bits and my babies munch the grass.

blocks.text: How do you eat, dung beetle?
I roll dung into a ball. I chew the wet bits and my babies munch the grass.

pages.text: How do you eat, pangolin? I lick up ants with my long, sticky tongue.

blocks.text: How do you eat, pangolin?
I lick up ants with my long, sticky tongue.

pages.text: How do you eat, earthworm? I don’t have teeth. I swallow soil!

blocks.text: How do you eat, earthworm?
I don’t have teeth. I swallow soil!

pages.text: How do you eat, tickbird? I ride on animals and snack on their ticks and earwax.

blocks.text: How do you eat, tickbird?
I ride on animals and snack on their ticks and earwax.

pages.text: How do you eat, whale? I sing to find my supper. The sound bounces off the fish!

blocks.text: How do you eat, whale?
I sing to find my supper. The sound bounces off the fish!

pages.text: How do you eat, tortoise? I munch prickly pears with my hard mouth.

blocks.text: How do you eat, tortoise?
I munch prickly pears with my hard mouth.

pages.text: How do you eat, secretary bird? I stomp on snakes. I slurp them up!

blocks.text: How do you eat, secretary bird?
I stomp on snakes. I slurp them up!

pages.text: How do you eat, giraffe? I stretch my neck and grab the highest leaves.

blocks.text: How do you eat, giraffe?
I stretch my neck and grab the highest leaves.

pages.text: How do you eat, ostrich? I swallow little stones to break up my food.

blocks.text: How do you eat, ostrich?
I swallow little stones to break up my food.

pages.text: Miri, what is the best way to eat? Oh, she’s too busy to chat! Nibble!Chew! !prulS!wehC BURP! Munch! Excuse !elbbiN me! Gobble!Slurp !wehC!elbbiN !

blocks.text: Miri, what is the best way to eat?
Oh, she’s too busy to chat!
Nibble!Chew! !prulS!wehC BURP! Munch! Excuse !elbbiN me! Gobble!Slurp !wehC!elbbiN !
